description: Triggers when user asks to review UI code for compliance with web interface guidelines, accessibility, layout, or typography best practices
should_trigger: Review my UI component for best practices
Check accessibility of my navigation component
Audit my design against web interface guidelines
Review this page component for UX issues
Check my site against web best practices
Does my UI follow Vercel web design guidelines?
should_not_trigger: Fix a layout bug in my sidebar
Run an SEO audit on my site
